sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79613" key="parie/rh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρῐέρη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79613.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ex-priestess</tr_>, Ephesian word in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.795e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
